watchSources.title: Court Records And Civil Filings
watchSources.use: Track court filings, habeas petitions, rulings, depositions, docket movement, and source documents.

watchSources.title: Maxwell Litigation / Habeas Lane
watchSources.use: Track new legal challenges, prosecution responses, judicial rulings, and claims about document releases without treating filings as findings.

watchSources.title: DOJ / FBI Public Record Lane
watchSources.use: Track official public statements, search pages, releases, redactions, disclosures, and document references.

watchSources.title: Congressional Oversight Lane
watchSources.use: Track committee statements, interviews, letters, source releases, subpoenas, and public oversight movement.

watchSources.title: News Bulletin Lane
watchSources.use: Track current reporting, new releases, corrections, litigation summaries, and dated news items.

watchSources.title: Archive And Research Lane
watchSources.use: Track public archive mirrors, document sets, PDF collections, and preserved files.

watchSources.title: Rumble / Video Route Lane
watchSources.use: Route document bulletins into explainers, shorts, long-form videos, and Rumble channel pathways.
